message:
fix(clippy): sweep 10 warnings in policy tests and namespace proptests

- Replace audit_chain().len() > 0 with !audit_chain().is_empty() (3 sites)
- Rename input_b_{pane,conn,wf} to cross_{pane,conn,wf} to avoid similar_names (3 bindings)
- Remove needless &borrows on pane_id.to_string() and format!() in proptests (4 sites)

Zero-warning clippy --all-targets -D warnings on frankenterm-core.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
